docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANEGAS, ISAMEL INDIVIDUALLY BANEGAS, BRANDY A MINOR, BY AND THROUGH HER GURDIAN AD LITEM ISMAEL BANEGAS AS TO DEFENDANT MORAD, TANYA MORAD, CYRUS MORAD, DEANA REYES, UDIZ DOES 1 TO 50 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-05-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-29-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-20-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-28-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-05-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-14-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-14-2004 CONTINUED TO MAR-17-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO TRANSFER CASE TO SMALL CLAIMS JURISDICTION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-17-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-17-2004 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
